project_type: Electron desktop app (new greenfield project inside existing repo)
build_command: Cannot run npm install in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode. Source code validation only.
test_command: Cannot run tests without npm install. AST/syntax validation only.
verification_instructions: Verify all JS files have valid syntax using node --check. Verify package.json is valid JSON. Verify all referenced files exist.
setup_instructions: User runs 'npm install' on their own machine with internet access, then 'npm start' to launch.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install npm packages, download ffmpeg-static, or make any external HTTP requests. All source code must be written directly. Validation is limited to syntax checks.
key_patterns: The Python script uses: PQ EOTF (ST 2084), Rec.2020->XYZ matrix, gamut classification via triangle test, ffmpeg rawvideo pipe decoding (gbrp10le 10-bit), matplotlib 3-panel chart. All must be ported to JavaScript.
directory_structure: electron-app/ - New Electron application directory containing all app source code. analysis/ subfolder contains the HDR analysis logic ported from Python.
